title: 突撃！　ごはんアンケート！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer rolls around, and we arrive at the academy's seaside facilities
to begin our summer training session. Right before we start,
however...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Do you have a moment before we start training? I wanted to give you
something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap rummages through her bag and pulls out a sheet of paper.
It looks to be some kind of handwritten questionnaire.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Could you fill this out while I'm warming up? It shouldn't take long.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I quickly glance over the questions.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Do you like sweet food?" "Do you like spicy food?" "Do you have
any food allergies?" ...All the questions seem to be about food.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
They're mostly yes-no questions, so you shouldn't have to think too
hard about your answers.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You'll do it, right?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thanks. I'll leave you to it then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I fill out the questionnaire while Oguri Cap runs her warm-up laps.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thanks. I'll check your answers later tonight and see if there's
anything to be avoided.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yep, don't worry about it. You filled everything out, so I should have
a pretty good grasp.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Let's focus on training for now. I need to be sure I'm prepped for
tonight.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Work hard, play hard. I'll push through today's training and make sure
I expend as much energy as possible.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Don't you know? Tonight is... Hmmm, wait a sec.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: It's better I keep this a secret, right?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, certainly a dilemma. Well, I'll think about it a bit more after we
finish training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something appears to be on Oguri Cap's mind, but I decide to drop
the subject for now and focus on her training.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Phew.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Is that the last of our regimen? I feel like I can do a bit more...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I guess you're right. I don't want to push myself too hard today.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I still have to go over your answers and get ready for later.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I took a peek at the paper earlier, but I've never done this before, so
it's better to play it safe and have extra time...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, there's a place I'd like to take you. Let's wash up and meet in
front of the training hall.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: No. No eating.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Don't get me wrong. I just finished training. I'm starving. But as much
as I'd like to eat, we can't. Not yet, at least.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The training hall is especially fragrant around this time. Dinner today
is fried chicken and boiled vegetables, so I expect the halls to be
especially aromatic.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: But we must overcome this temptation. There's something we need to do. And if that means skipping a meal or two, then so be it.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: So... Please, no eating.
choice_data_list: A-all right, if you say so...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...I think I'll make a quick stop by the cafeteria and ask if they can
save me some food for later though.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: In any case, I'll see you soon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Oguri Cap hurries away. Later that evening...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: We're finally here.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Look at all these food stalls. Amazing, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yep. I just had to have dinner here.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
As you can see, there are so many food options available to us. I'm
sure you'll find something you like.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Eat as much as you like—my treat. I wanted to thank you for
everything you've done for me.
choice_data_list: Is this what the questionnaire was about?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I realized that you know way more about me than I do about
you. It's only fair that I at least find out what your culinary likes and
dislikes are.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
In any case, you do so much to support me. I just wanted to return the
favor in my own way. So dinner's on me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Oguri Cap must've put a lot of time and effort into coming up with this plan... She's usually more occupied with the eating part...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Besides... whenever I'm with you, everything tastes great no matter
what I'm eating. So I wanted to come here together...
choice_data_list: Always a pleasure to share a meal with you!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Great. If you're happy, I'm happy.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
All right, then. Shall we begin? We'll start with all the jumbo-sized
foods.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Everything here is so big. "Jumbo" doesn't even cover it.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
There's enough shaved ice to fill a bucket, and the okonomiyaki's big
enough to serve as cushions. And the takoyaki? They're the size of
baseballs.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You say that, but shaved ice is mostly water. And look at the
okonomiyaki. It's all cabbage.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You couldn't call any of this a meal. This is more like... an appetizer.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Heh, I'm glad you're as excited as I am. I feel ya. I can't wait to start
eating.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, mister! Can I get two servings of shaved ice and four
okonomiyaki?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh. I want to try out the other stalls too, so we're starting off
light. If you want more, we can come back later.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: No need to hold back. Feel free to eat to your heart's content.
choice_data_list: There's no way I can eat all of thi—

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I need anything, you're always the first person to provide
it. This is my way of saying thank you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I've never done anything like this before, so it's kind of
embarrassing... but please accept my gratitude.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap's words of gratitude were moving... But not moving enough
to dislodge me from my seat after stuffing myself immobile.
